data.name: label1.Text
data.value:
Donation frequency: Every 56 days, up to 6 times a year. You must be in good health and feeling well. You must be at least 16 years old in most states. You must weigh at least 110 lbs.
Male donors: must be at least 17 years old in most states, at least 5'1" tall and weigh at least 130 lbs
Female donors: must be at least 19 years old, at least 5'3" tall and weigh at least 150 lbs
